hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.sh ]]; then out=$(bash -n "$file" 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "BASH SYNTAX ERROR in $file:"; echo "$out"; fi; fi
file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.sh ]] && command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1; then shellcheck -S warning "$file" 2>/dev/null | head -20; fi

file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == */README.md ]]; then echo 'README REMINDER: README.md and README.en.md must stay structurally in sync — check the sections in README.en.md (skill sync-readmes).'; elif [[ "$file" == */README.en.md ]]; then echo 'README REMINDER: README.en.md and README.md must stay structurally in sync — check the sections in README.md (skill sync-readmes).'; fi

file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == */scripts/*.sh || "$file" == */lib/*.sh || "$file" == */install.sh || "$file" == */uninstall.sh || "$file" == */update.sh || "$file" == */launchd/*.template ]]; then echo 'CHANGELOG REMINDER: behavior changed — add an entry to CHANGELOG.md (Keep a Changelog) and bump VERSION if warranted (skill release). Check whether docs/how-it-works.md is now stale.'; fi

cmd="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git (commit|push)'; then echo 'PRE-COMMIT REMINDER: run skill check-scripts (bash -n + shellcheck on changed *.sh) and make sure README.md/README.en.md are in sync before committing.'; fi
